page_content:
Credit Only Granted for. BUDT758X OR BUDT704.

Formerly: BUDT758X.

BUDT705 Data Visualization for Business (2 Credits)

An introduction to data visualization techniques. Data-driven decisions are increasingly embedded in business organizations, so professionals must be able to explore and communicate data with understandable and powerful visualizations.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H Smith.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
